title: Supply Chain Manager - SFC Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - SFC Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
